Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class EnrollmentType1

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.EnrollmentType1
public class EnrollmentType1 extends Object
EnrollmentType1 - Describes the name of the enrollment; Expressed as an enum

      public static EnrollmentType1 of(String value)
      Returns a EnrollmentType1 with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
